contributors.limitations: Contributor counts use public GitHub issue, PR and contributor endpoints only.

limitations: Search queries are intentionally not collected.
Counts use GoatCounter's privacy-aware visitor model.

metric_definitions.documentation_not_found_count: Documentation 404 events grouped by normalized path.
metric_definitions.documentation_search_count: Documentation search events without raw query text.
metric_definitions.documentation_visitors: Aggregate documentation visitors from the configured documentation analytics provider.
metric_definitions.github_actions_success_rate: Completed successful workflow runs divided by completed runs.
metric_definitions.median_first_response_days: Median days until the first issue or PR comment by someone other than the author.
metric_definitions.median_first_review_days: Median days until the first pull-request review by someone other than the author.
metric_definitions.median_issue_close_days: Median days from issue creation to close.
metric_definitions.median_pr_merge_days: Median days from pull request creation to merge.
metric_definitions.open_over_threshold_items: Open issues and pull requests older than reporting.stale_days.
metric_definitions.readthedocs_no_result_searches: Documentation search queries that returned zero results.
metric_definitions.release_asset_downloads: GitHub release asset downloads, excluding generated source archives.
metric_definitions.untriaged_items: Open issues or pull requests with no labels.

definitions.github_stale_label: The GitHub stale label is preserved separately in label filters and label metrics.
definitions.open_over_threshold_items: Open issues and pull requests older than the configured 90-day threshold.

releases.note: GitHub auto-generated source archives are not counted as release-asset downloads.
releases.zero_download_explanation: No uploaded release assets were found; GitHub-generated source archives are excluded.

policy.retention: Persistent cumulative metrics only; issue and PR history is reconstructed.

documentation_analytics.limitation: Uses GoatCounter aggregate API endpoints only.

engagement.limitation: First-response and review metrics require collected issue comments and PR reviews. When review data is absent, review timing is reported as unavailable.
engagement.message: Derived from collected issue comments and bounded recent PR review data.

github.limitation: Uses public GitHub repository, issue, pull request, release and contributor APIs. Some historic label and reopen events may be unavailable.

github_actions.limitation: Requires Actions read permissions and an authenticated token.

github_traffic.limitation: Requires repository traffic permissions; implementation is credential-gated.

openalex.limitation: OpenAlex citation counts can lag publisher and Crossref updates.

readthedocs.limitation: Requires Read the Docs analytics access or a validated CSV import.

snapshots.limitation: Stores only cumulative metrics that cannot be reconstructed from issue, PR or release timestamps.

zenodo.limitation: Zenodo statistics are cumulative public record totals.
